cost_quality_pareto: 125M points are exact branch and marginal costs from canonical run_inventory rows.
760M warm-start marginal cost combines ETA-derived S2_ADAPT cost with observed resumed S2 cost.
760M full-branch cost is intentionally omitted because author-provided seed GPU-hours are external.
continuation_trajectories: Only 125M continuation data exists; 760M continuation was not run.
dclm8k_comparison: Plots final S2/S3 checkpoints on the DCLM 8K surface; 760M S0/S1 controls are not available.
